children.heading: Acquisition of buildings and facilities
children.label: a Acquisition of buildings and facilities
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, in order to respond to an emergency situation, the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate may acquire buildings and facilities, subject to the availability of appropriations, for the use of the Senate, as appropriate, by lease, purchase, or such other arrangement as the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate considers appropriate (including a memorandum of understanding with the head of an executive agency, as defined in , in the case of a building or facility under the control of such Agency). Actions taken by the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate must be approved by the Committees on Appropriations and Rules and Administration.section 105 of title 5
agreements with the United States Capitol Police or any other entity relating to the policing of such building or facility; and
agreements with the Architect of the Capitol or any other entity relating to the care and maintenance of such building or facility.

children.heading: Authority of Capitol Police and Architect
children.label: c Authority of Capitol Police and Architect

children.heading: Architect of the Capitol
children.label: 1 Architect of the Capitol
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Architect of the Capitol may take any action necessary to carry out an agreement entered into with the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate pursuant to subsection (b).

children.heading: Transfer of certain funds
children.label: d Transfer of certain funds
children.text: Subject to the approval of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate, the Architect of the Capitol may transfer to the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate amounts made available to the Architect for necessary expenses for the maintenance, care and operation of the Senate office buildings during a fiscal year in order to cover any portion of the costs incurred by the Sergeant at Arms of the Senate during the year in acquiring a building or facility pursuant to subsection (a).

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: e Effective date
children.text: This section and the amendments made by this section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2002 and each succeeding fiscal year.
